crime.value: Disappearance - Roxanne has gone missing from her workplace at the record shop
crime.quote: So Roxanne was two hours late. Cassie frequently checked her text inbox, but she wasn't receiving any text messages.

victim.value: Roxanne (Roxxie), a young woman working minimum wage at a failing record shop to support her family
victim.quote: Roxxie had to work two shifts every weekday to get enough money for the groceries, as her dad never did anything

closed_world.value: Local neighborhood including the record shop, family home, and club venue where clues are being left
closed_world.quote: the local news had gotten a grasp on Roxxie's absence and notified the area

investigator.value: Cassie, the younger sister of the missing person, following riddles left as clues
investigator.quote: She read the riddle constantly, trying to think of anything subliminal hidden in the text

red_herring.value: Initial focus on car accident parallel to mother's death creates false urgency about fatal outcome
red_herring.quote: her mum died in a car accident on her way back from a business trip in London

clue_fairness.value: Riddles and clues are presented to reader simultaneously with protagonist's discovery
clue_fairness.quote: Well done, Cassie, You got the right place, you see, And though you can't see me yet, Behind the clouds it's lovely.

social_world.value: Working-class family structure with absent father, minimum wage employment, and financial strain
social_world.quote: She worked at minimum wage, but never complained, which was unlike her. The sisters rarely saw their father

reveal_mechanic.value: Progressive riddle-solving through location-based clues hidden in specific places
reveal_mechanic.quote: folded bit of pink paper of some sort hiding under the writing, tucked behind the bulk of the dispenser

media_and_audience.value: Local news coverage frames disappearance as public concern, using graduation photo for identification
media_and_audience.quote: the local news had gotten a grasp on Roxxie's absence and notified the area, providing the audience with a photograph

investigator_wound.value: Cassie's trauma from mother's sudden death drives obsessive fear of losing sister
investigator_wound.quote: ever since Mum disappeared, I've been so scared of her going missing and now she has
